testcase.name: test_categories_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'icon': 'Zap', 'id': 'electricity', 'name': 'Електричество'}, {'icon': 'Droplets', 'id': 'plumbing', 'name': 'ВиК'}, {'icon': 'Paintbrush', 'id': 'painting', 'name': 'Боядисване'}, {'icon': 'Boxes', 'id': 'concrete', 'name': 'Бетон'}, {'icon': 'Grid3x3', 'id': 'reinforcement', 'name': 'Арматура'}, {'icon': 'LayoutGrid', 'id': 'tiling', 'name': 'Фаянс и теракота'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration15_pdf_translations.py:95: in test_categories_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'categories': [{'icon': 'Zap', 'id': 'electricity', 'name': 'Електричество'}, {'icon': 'Droplets', 'id': 'plumbing', 'name': 'ВиК'}, {'icon': 'Paintbrush', 'id': 'painting', 'name': 'Боядисване'}, {'icon': 'Boxes', 'id': 'concrete', 'name': 'Бетон'}, {'icon': 'Grid3x3', 'id': 'reinforcement', 'name': 'Арматура'}, {'icon': 'LayoutGrid', 'id': 'tiling', 'name': 'Фаянс и теракота'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.name: test_stats_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration15_pdf_translations.py:103: in test_stats_endpoint assert "projects" in data or "companies" in data E AssertionError: assert ('projects' in {'total_companies': 0, 'total_projects': 0, 'total_reviews': 0} or 'companies' in {'total_companies': 0, 'total_projects': 0, 'total_reviews': 0})

testcase.name: test_professions_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration15_pdf_translations.py:122: in test_professions_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regional_prices_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration15_pdf_translations.py:131: in test_regional_prices_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
